package rulefixtures

// scenario for unnecessary_map_for_set_of_ints: `map[int]bool` or `map[int]struct{}` used as a set for small dense integer ranges
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule691NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario691Negative(records []Rule691NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
